# Bowl Bar Bled

> Small bowl bar in Bled, Slovenia. Fresh poke bowls. Open every day 12:00-20:00.

Website: https://bowlbarbled.si
Location: Ljubljanska cesta 4, 4260 Bled, Slovenia (Trgovski center Bled)
Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Bowl%20Bar%20Bled%2C%20Ljubljanska%20cesta%204%2C%204260%20Bled%2C%20Slovenia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bowlbar_bled/

## Pages

- Slovenian: https://bowlbarbled.si/sl/
- English: https://bowlbarbled.si/en/
- German: https://bowlbarbled.si/de/
- Italian: https://bowlbarbled.si/it/

## Key facts

- Name: Bowl Bar Bled
- Business type: Bowl / poke bar
- City: Bled, Slovenia
- Address: Ljubljanska cesta 4, 4260 Bled
- Inside/near: Trgovski center Bled
- Opening hours: every day 12:00-20:00
- Price range: EUR 8.90-14.90

## Menu

- Salmon Bowl — EUR 13.90
- Tuna Bowl — EUR 14.90
- Chicken Bowl — EUR 13.90
- Green Bowl — EUR 11.90
- Mixed Bowl — EUR 14.90
- Vegi Bowl — EUR 13.90
- Kids Bowl — EUR 8.90

For full ingredients, see /llms-full.txt.
